Subject: RE: Delmarva Power & Light Capacity Release
Message:
Hi All,

Delmarva has awarded 5000 dts/d of zone 3-6 (nny) capacity for the Nov
'01-Mar '02 period at a rate of $29.596/dt/month. It is pre-arranged, but
biddable (pre-arranged shipper has ROFR rights until 4pm). The offer number
on Transit is # 25005-1.
